name: Interleaving String
description: Given strings s1, s2, and s3, determine whether s3 is formed by an interleaving of s1 and s2. An interleaving is a configuration where s3 contains all characters of s1 and s2 and the relative order of characters from each string is preserved.
constraints: 0 <= s1.length, s2.length <= 100. 0 <= s3.length <= 200. s1, s2, s3 consist of lowercase English letters.

performance.stress_intent: separate interleaving DP from exponential backtracking using long repeated-character merge ambiguities
